name: Managed IT Services
description: Outsourced IT operations including service desk, endpoint management, network monitoring, and cloud infrastructure management — delivered against contractual SLAs that guarantee response and resolution times, enabling mid-market companies to maintain enterprise-grade IT reliability without building a 24/7 internal operations team.
positioning: The only managed services provider in DACH that combines nationwide on-site presence through 80+ locations with centralized NOC/SOC operations — where pure-play MSPs offer remote monitoring only, Bechtle dispatches certified engineers locally within hours.
